strategy: Dewey is stunable and beguilable. Beguile or stun him to steal his cheat turns and set up safely.
Track your Blades and damage Globals. On a 4-step cycle the 2nd casts Plague and the 4th casts Virulent Plague on you, so cast them sparingly.
Skip DoTs. Any Damage-over-Time triggers Mass Triage that wipes it.
Each damage spell drops a same-school Shield on its target, and multi-hit spells shield per hit. Set up with Feint and traps, then land one oversized hit that punches through a single shield.
Do not join late; a latecomer eats a Mana Burn for 2 pips. He resists Death 80%, so hit off-school.
cheatNotes: Joining the duel after round 1 makes Dewey cast a no-damage Mana Burn that strips 2 pips.
Every damage spell you cast makes him interrupt-cast a Shield of that damage's school on the target.
Multi-hit or multi-target damage spells make him cast one shield per hit, stacking protection fast.
Balance damage specifically makes him drop a Tower Shield on the target.
Any Damage-over-Time you cast makes him interrupt-cast Mass Triage, clearing DoTs from the board.
The first Blade or damage Global cast by anyone makes him Tower Shield himself.
The second Blade or damage Global makes him cast Plague.
The third Blade or damage Global makes him cast Legion Shield.
The fourth Blade or damage Global makes him cast Virulent Plague.
A fifth Blade or damage Global resets the cycle back to the Tower Shield step.
